---
ID: US-CMP-BE-412
Title: Search query support and indexing
Status: Not Started
Verified: false
Backdated: 2026-04-25
Ticket: CMP-BE-412
Epic: CMP-E4: Content Library, Search, and Discovery
---

As a user
I want search across title/body/topic/campaign so relevant content is easy to find.
So claim and review actions are faster.

Acceptance Criteria:
- [ ] Search supports title/body matching at minimum.
- [ ] Topic and campaign name matching is supported.
- [ ] Search is scoped by RLS permissions.
- [ ] Query performance remains stable under target dataset size.
- [ ] No-results path returns deterministic empty state metadata.
